Our Story 🚀

🌟
The Beginning
The day the universe decided our paths should cross — nothing was ordinary ever again.
😂
The Laughter
All those stupid jokes and late-night talks that made my stomach hurt from laughing.
💌
The Feels
Quiet moments — just existing together — that said more than a thousand words ever could.
🏅
The Champion
Watching you win, grow, and shine. Stronger every single day — I'm your biggest fan.
🎂
Today
Your birthday. The day the world got a little better when you arrived. Here's to you! 🥂
🔮
Forever
Whatever comes next — I'll be right there beside you. Always, always, always.
Aarthika 🌸
"In a world full of ordinary days,
you are the rare kind of magic
that only happens once in a lifetime.
I am endlessly grateful my lifetime has you."
💕
— Wishing you infinite happiness, always ✨
